sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Advanced School Spell
feat.text: You gain access to the advanced teachings of your arcane institution, learning a powerful new school spell. You gain the advanced school spell for your arcane school.

traits.name: Wizard
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the wizard class.

archetype.name: Red Mantis Assassin
archetype.note: This archetype offers Advanced School Spell at a different level than displayed here.
